title: Detect Cycles in 2D Grid
hints: Consider traversing the grid using DFS. How can you track visited cells to distinguish a new path from the one you just came from?
For each cell, start a DFS only if it is unvisited. During traversal, if you encounter a visited cell that is not your immediate parent, you found a cycle.
Keep a separate visited set for each DFS run. If a DFS starts from a cell already in the global visited set, skip it to avoid redundant work.
